case_title: SADAE GANT VS. DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GANT, SADAE AS TO DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC DBA PRIMO WATER CORP. AKA PRIMO WATER NORTH AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2023 - MATTER ARGUED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF SADAE GANT WAS PRESENT, CHARLES BURLEIGH, ROUTE SPECIALIST, WAS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF DS SERVICES OF AMERICA. TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2023 BY CURTIS KARNOW. EXHIBITS FROM PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE RETAINED.. JUDGE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GANT, SADAE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC DBA PRIMO WATER CORP. AKA PRIMO WATER NORTH AMERICA JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $0 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHARLES BURLEIGH, ROUTE SPECIALIST FILED BY DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC DBA PRIMO WATER CORP. AKA PRIMO WATER NORTH AMERICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED JUN-22-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC DBA PRIMO WATER CORP. AKA PRIMO WATER NORTH AMERICA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2023 - TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH ON AUG-04-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 611. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SADAE GANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC DBA PRIMO WATER CORP AKA PRIMO WATER NORTH AMERICA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHARLES BURLEIGH, ROUTE SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WITNESS SUE NIX, INSURANCE ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
